Universal CityWalk.description:
1st Mix in - FREE

Additional Mix-ins (adds 5-190 cal. per serving) - $0.99

Includes your choice of Ice Cream flavor & 1 Mix-in (330-1390 / 540-2150 cal.)

Additional Mix-Ins (5-190 cal.) - $0.99
crinkle-cut dill pickles, ranch dressing, horseradish aioli

Universal Epic Universe.description: lemon cream cheese, Chambord sauce and fresh berries wrapped in a delicate crêpe
crispy shrimp, chili sauce, micro cilantro, sesame seeds
poured tableside with caramelized onions, apple cider, blue cheese croutons and chive oil
golden creamy shells, fruit salad, cheese fish cracker

Universal Epic Universe.itemName: Rodney Strong<sup xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml">®</sup> Rosé of Pinot Noir

Universal Epic Universe.description: Verdicchio dei Castelli di Jesi Classico Superiore, Italy
a bold, hoppy beer with notes of citrus and pine, balanced by a smooth malt backbone

Universal Epic Universe.itemName: Left Hand Brewing Co.<sup xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml">®</sup> Milk Stout
Universal Epic Universe.description: smooth, creamy stout with rich notes of chocolate and coffee, with a touch of sweet cream richness on the finish
smooth and hazy wheat beer with mild notes of banana bread and clove. Light malt sweetness and a crisp refreshing finish

Universal Epic Universe.itemName: Rodney Strong<sup xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml">®</sup> Rosé of Pinot Noir
Elysian Brewing Co.<sup xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml">®</sup> Space Dust IPA

Universal Epic Universe.description: creamy mac & cheese with bbq harissa pulled pork, peanut bacon jam and parsley served in a crunchy cone

Universal Epic Universe.itemName: Extra day of refills for Freestyle<sup xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml">®</sup> Cup

Universal Epic Universe.description: chicken confit stuffed pasta, baby turnips, fava beans, amazu foam, caramelized onion soubise
